name: Democrats.org
subject: Trump's reality-denying to-do list:
body:
Here's what we're going to be fighting for Democrats
---
**Democrats are taking the fight to Trump and the GOP, and we need your help. Chip in $3 or more today:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef4/633873464/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Over the past few weeks since Election Day, Donald Trump has been hard at work backtracking on his campaign promises. But if you've been wondering whether that means he might actually start to heed the thousands of scientists and decades of research when it comes to climate change... well, not so much.

His incoming chief of staff, Republican Party Chairman Reince Priebus, has assured us that denying climate science -- or "a bunch of bunk," as he referred to it -- is Trump's "default position."

Rolling back the progress we have made under President Obama to bring the world together on this critical issue is going to be at the top of Trump's reality-denying to-do list. We simply cannot let him go unchecked.

This is an important fight not just today, but for the generations to come. We have an obligation to combat climate change and stop Republican attempts to roll back protections that keep our air safe to breathe and water safe to drink. So if you can, pitch in $3 or more today to help us stand up to Trump and the GOP and show that Democrats believe in reality, trust scientists, and are ready to fight for our planet.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef5/633873464/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef2/633873464/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef3/633873464/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef0/633873464/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070ef1/633873464/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070efe/633873464/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd")**

** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070eff/633873464/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070efc/633873464/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070efd/633873464/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c37a/4067b0a/224802bc4/7e070efa/633873464/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_ew_nd&source=em_20161202_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Governor-elect Chris Sununu
subject: You're invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
---
| Friends,
It is an honor to be your Governor-elect! I cannot thank you enough for all of your hard work this past year to help preserve our Republican majorities in the State House, State Senate, and the Executive Council. We have a lot of work to do in the State House to grow our state, but before my term starts in January I hope to catch up with you at the NHGOP’s upcoming Victory Dinner.
Purchase your tickets today! [Click here or the invitation below.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAONS6Aib8p9E2AIkD9i2eqyUS-2BnOz6PXnItmWNZjiIC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M5QqUBBLK0PCTiHzFWGZTRgKmipBJpdv9Yrl-2B-2Byi66tuVPcq-2F7haJMOHmvTHMHsVwo-2BwcklpDcBjRLOtKFa1h8qcIRx3-2FbL8yslqsvoyTO6VZRHsI-2FOWr6pP4VY-2BwCYCpF3EQoPXhXiP75QOqnWHPRRRdIe3ERJcrf2iIPFVUWqd9irElg6i1v-2F8l7DljG6u7f8DayrvfwsOr0t74QBu5mEDQdsLr4jNBY0lboCzx8Gx9IykTW7nKe-2F2qY-2FP1vQwAxFiEdADW47j-2FzqXNjPbS4g-3D-3D) |

Best wishes,
Governor-elect Chris Sununu |

clean_body: | | | Friends, It is an honor to be your Governor-elect! I cannot thank you enough for all of your hard work this past year to help preserve our Republican majorities in the State House, State Senate, and the Executive Council. We have a lot of work to do in the State House to grow our state, but before my term starts in January I hope to catch up with you at the NHGOP’s upcoming Victory Dinner. Purchase your tickets today! | | I look forward to celebrating our victories with you on December 7 and uniting our party as we enter the New Year. Best wishes, Governor-elect Chris Sununu | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301

name: Democrats.org
subject: We're fighting for every American. Are you with us?
body:
Stand with Democrats who are fighting for the middle class The Democratic Party**Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats fight back against Trump and the Republican Party:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c370/4067b0a/2245bc14d/7e07e099/854993718/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161202_dnc_nd&source=em_20161202_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c370/4067b0a/2245bc14d/7e07e0a6/854993718/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_dnc_nd&source=em_20161202_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c370/4067b0a/2245bc14d/7e07e0a7/854993718/VEsHDA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_dnc_nd&source=em_20161202_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c370/4067b0a/2245bc14d/7e07e0a4/854993718/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161202_dnc_nd&source=em_20161202_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: SIGN THE CARD (via DSCC)
subject: 🎈🎉 To: Harry Reid From: You 🎈🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's Senator Harry Reid's birthday! Sign his card with well wishes and gratitude for all he's done for Democrats. With only 13 hours left on the triple match, just look at who's been asking you to help us hit our most critical deadline yet!
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a513/2425587581/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/happy-birthday-harry-reid")

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a513/2425587581/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/happy-birthday-harry-reid")
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a513/2425587581/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/happy-birthday-harry-reid")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a513/2425587581/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/happy-birthday-harry-reid")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a513/2425587581/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/happy-birthday-harry-reid")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-reid-birthday?refcode=DPE-20161202-SignDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a50d/2425587581/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a50c/2425587581/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee18/2b07114c/43fd786b/7360a50f/2425587581/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Marcy Stech, EMILY's List
subject: Trump's nominees: What you need to know >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c6/50254454/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all")
---

| | Peter,

Donald Trump is picking his cabinet, and it's a woman's worst nightmare.

There's Representative Tom Price, his choice for health and human services secretary, who cosponsored legislation multiple times that threatened to upend _Roe v. Wade_ and make some forms of birth control illegal.

Senator Jeff Sessions, Trump's nominee for attorney general, is no better. He voted multiple times to allow violent, convicted anti-choice offenders to avoid court fines by declaring bankruptcy.

Women and families deserve better than this. Let's do everything we can to fight back.

**[Donate $3 today to send a message to Donald Trump: Tell him our right to choose is not up for debate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c7/50254454/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161202_email_Cabinet?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+send+a+message+to+Dona&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all")**

Trump's nominees have anti-choice, anti-woman, and anti-family records that we have to call out.

Tom Price has been a vocal opponent of the Affordable Care Act. His nomination to lead the Department of Health and Human Services is a clear sign that Trump plans to decimate the law that's helped so many women and families. Price also voted against reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act, and he's consistently voted to defund Planned Parenthood.

Jeff Sessions has suggested that grabbing women by the genitals without their consent isn't sexual assault. And he opposed legislation to help women-owned businesses.

Betsy DeVos, Trump's nominee for secretary of education, has worked to gut funding for public schools, yet has no qualms about contributing money to right-wing anti-choice efforts. Her family's foundations gave over $1 million to a single crisis pregnancy center; these centers are often extremist fronts that lure in pregnant women and lie to them about the risks of abortion.

It's not just that no one in Trump's potential cabinet is looking out for women and families -- it's that they are all actively opposed to any policies helping them. It's time to fight back.

**Tell Donald Trump and his cabinet picks that women won't let them roll back our progress. Donate $3 today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Time-To-Fight-Back](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c0/50254454/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161202_email_Cabinet?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTimeToFightBack&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all")**

Thank you,

Marcy Stech
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c1/50254454/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161202_email_Cabinet?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c2/50254454/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2c3/50254454/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76e2/24c69fd9/27027b0/18efd2fc/50254454/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all&source=WPEFEX02N_digital_email_20161202_Cabinet_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
